Sql: SELECT *, series_pearson_correlation(s, s) AS pf FROM (SELECT LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t, LIST(COALESCE(s_val, 0) ORDER BY _ts) AS s FROM (SELECT UNNEST(range(TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-04 00:00:00', 86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')) AS _ts) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT EPOCH_MS(CAST(FLOOR(EPOCH_MS(t)/86400000)*86400000 AS BIGINT)) AS _bucket, MAX(v) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', 0), (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-02 00:00:00', 0), (TIMESTAMP '2021-01-03 00:00:00', 5)) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket)
